pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin version to a recent release compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older plugin versions may lack support for the 'release' flag or fail to compile against JDK 21 toolchains.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch compiler configuration from source/target to release flag for Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags are deprecated for modern Java versions; using 'release' ensures correct API and bytecode compatibility for JDK 21.
